_comment: タスク種別 → 必要 Lark スコープのマッピング定義。identity は user / bot / either のいずれか。

user.label: user (user_access_token)
user.when: The action must be performed as a real, named person. Lark attributes the action to that user for audit trail, quota, and permission purposes.
user.provision: User must authorize the app via OAuth. Token is scoped to one user.

bot.label: bot (tenant_access_token)
bot.when: The action is system-initiated on behalf of the tenant, not a specific person. Typically used for sending programmatic notifications, scheduling background reads, or posting to group chats.
bot.provision: App must be added to the target chat or space. No individual user authorization required.

either.label: either (user or bot depending on context)
either.when: This compound task spans actions that naturally belong to different authority types. Typically: the record creation or document edit is user-identity, while the IM notification is bot-identity.
examples: expense creation + approval submission + manager notification
either.provision: Agent should split the task: execute record/doc actions with user token, send notifications with bot token. Or use a single tenant token if the Lark app has been granted both surface permissions.

readonly.description: 読み取り専用プロファイル — データ閲覧・分析用途

writer.description: 書き込みプロファイル — 日常業務・コンテンツ作成用途

admin.description: 管理者プロファイル — ワークスペース・フロー管理用途

backoffice_agent.description: バックオフィスエージェント — 経費・稟議・ドキュメント処理用途

131006.message: permission denied: wiki space permission denied
131006.fix: Lark Open Platform でアプリを Wiki スペースのメンバーに追加してください

99991663.message: The app has not been granted permission
99991663.fix: Open Platform の「権限とスコープ」で必要なスコープを有効化してください

99991668.fix: tenant access token を使用するか、ユーザーにアプリへの権限付与を依頼してください
